id.description: UUID v4. Stable puzzle identity. Used by libraries and .jiggstate for puzzle matching.

version.description: Spec version string. Used to detect breaking changes on open.

metadata.description: UI hints only. Engine never relies on these to function.

aspectRatio.description: Pre-computed image.width / image.height. Informational. image.width and image.height are authoritative.

path.description: Internal path to thumb.jpg within the archive.

hash.description: SHA-256 of thumb.jpg. Advisory — mismatch does not fail the load.

source.description: embedded = file inside ZIP. url = HTTP/HTTPS URL. local-fs reserved for future use.

path.description: Filename within the archive (embedded) or full URL (url).

hash.description: SHA-256 of image file bytes prior to ZIP compression. Mismatch = non-fatal warning.

pieces.description: Present = explicit geometry. Absent = procedural grid. Presence is the signal — no type field needed.

path.description: Filename of pieces.json within the archive.

hash.description: SHA-256 of pieces.json bytes prior to ZIP compression. Mismatch = fatal for state. App enters ReadOnly or prompts Reset.
